prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: character portrait. Story world: Tape 17: Pinewatch. Premise: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight.. Setting: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Threat presence: The Editor. Recurring motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens. Character portrait for Media Forensics Analyst Priya Sen, role WITNESS. Traits: reactive, observant. Response style: accusation=Defensive and selective.; threat=Withdraws and delays.; questioning=Provides partial truths first... Subgenre: found-footage investigation. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Tape 17: Pinewatch - Media Forensics Analyst Priya Sen Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
